description: CompositionBlack round neck top made of 95% cotton and 5% Lycra, has mutton-leg sleeves and crystal branding above the hemFitRegularWash careWash with warm waterDo not bleach, use chlorine or iron on printWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsarrow caters to fashionistas with a taste for the trendy and understated. This top is a basic piece in a sober hue, perfect for layering under a blazer. Wear it with your favourite jeans on days when it's too sunny for layering!Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
